title: Selecting Dividend Aristocrats Using SCHD's Methodology - Initial Results
text: I propose leveraging the stock selection criteria from the underlying index of SCHD to build a portfolio with a subset of Dividend Aristocrats. I am tracking two portfolios built using this process and comparing the results to NOBL and SCHD.

title: Illinois Tool (ITW) Up 22.3% in 6 Months: What's Driving It?
text: Illinois Tool (ITW) benefits from strong demand across its businesses and accretive buyouts. Its shareholder-friendly measures are also encouraging.

title: Why Shares in Illinois Tool Works Fell Today
text: The market sold off the industrial stock due to its exposure to the auto industry.

title: Jim Cramer says he likes these 3 industrial stocks heading into 2023
text: Jim Cramer said Friday he likes Caterpillar, Illinois Tool Works and CSX heading into 2023.
